Frequently Asked Questions

Ian Márquez-López

Institut d’Investigacions Biomèdiques August Pi i Sunyer (FRCB-IDIBAPS)

Compiled: June 09, 2026

Source: vignettes/articles/FAQ.Rmd
FAQ.Rmd

🚧 Coming Soon

Since this is the first release of IgScan, we do not have frequently asked questions yet.

We will update this section as users begin to interact with the package and share their doubts or suggestions.

In the meantime, feel free to:

  • Check out the Getting Started guide.

  • Explore the Reference section.

  • Open an issue on GitHub if you have any questions.

Thank you for using IgScan!

Developed by Ian Márquez-López, Ferran Nadeu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
